records.ety: [LL. sanatorius, fr. L. sanare to heal. See Sanable.]

defs: Conducive to health; tending to cure; healing; curative; sanative.
quotes: Sanatory ordinances for the protection of public health, such as quarantine, fever hospitals, draining, etc.
notes: ☞ Sanatory and sanitary should not be confounded. Sanatory signifies conducive to health, while sanitary has the more general meaning of pertaining to health.
